case_title: SKYLINE REALTY, INC. VS. EYSI PEASE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEASE, EYSI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. SERVED DEC-13-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEASE, EYSI
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING ON PREMISES AND MAILING; DECLARATION IN SUPPORT THEREOF, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC.
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. ON DEFENDANT PEASE, EYSI
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT PEASE, EYSI
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
